title: YISSVIC Electric Fly Swatter 4000V Bug Zapper Racket Rechargeable Mosquito Insect Fly Killer Electric 3 Layers Mesh with Type-C Cable for Indoor Outdoor Black Blue
bullet_points: Efficient Mosquito Zapper Killer: With powerful 4000-volt grids and a built-in small LED illuminating light (not attractant light), YISSVIC electric mosquito swatter can zap mosquitoes easily and efficiently, even in low-light or dark conditions

Rechargeable Bug Zapper Racket - Save Budget on Battery Replacements: YISSVIC electric fly swat comes with a rechargeable battery that has a good battery life, and the battery indicator on this bug bat zapper can notify you when it's time to recharge

Safe and Lightweight Fly Swatter Electric Zapper: This fly racket zapper is equipped with 3-layer nets, including 2 protective nets for safety. The lightweight design of this fly bat helps comfortable hold and wave when zapping mosquitos
Convenient Charging: The tennis racket fly zapper can be charged via the included Type-C cable (Power Plug Not Included), you can plug the fly tennis racket zapper into any USB device to rechage

Easy-to-use Bug Swatter Indoor: Made with durable material and a sturdy frame, this usb fly zapper racket is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use such as home, picnics, gardening, camping, etc. With this electric fly swatter racket, hunting mosquitos becomes an experience
description: YISSVIC Rechargeable Fly Swatter, the effective solution for effortlessly eliminating mosquitoes. With powerful 4000-volt grids and a built-in a small LED illuminate light this tennis racket fly zapper ensures efficient results even in low-light or dark conditions. Say goodbye to annoying insects and enjoy a bug-free environment with this fly swatter electric zapper! Equipped with a rechargeable battery, this electric fly swat offers a good battery life for extended use. The battery indicator on this usb fly zapper racketkeeps you informed about the charging status, ensuring you're always ready for action. Conveniently recharge the electric racket fly killer via the included Type-C cable (power plug not included) using any USB device. YISSVIC fly zapper electric prioritizes your protection. This rechargeable bug zapper racket features 3-layer nets, including 2 protective nets, to prevent accidental contact with the high-voltage grids of fly racket zapper. The lightweight design of this fly tennis racket zapper ensures a comfortable grip, allowing for easy waving and precise targeting of insects. Versatile and durable, this bug bat zapper is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. The sturdy frame and high-quality materials of Yissvic rechargeable bug zapper racket ensure reliable performance in various occasions, from your home to picnics, gardening, and camping trips. With the YISSVIC Rechargeable Fly Swatter, you can experience the convenience, efficiency, and safety it offers as you bid farewell to pesky mosquitoes and flies. Create a bug-free environment effortlessly with this easy-to-use electric racket fly killer.
